hero.title: [ES] We give shape
hero.description: [ES] A Mexican-American game studio crafting original worlds, unforgettable creatures, and games that teach — built by five Yucatecans who have been at this for two decades.

manifesto.body: [ES] For two decades we drew monsters, wrote impossible worlds, and shipped them under other names. Unknown Creature is the banner we finally raise as our own — a studio for original games, characters, and stories that honor where we come from.

originalGames.title: [ES] Original games
originalGames.text: [ES] Worlds, creatures, and stories born entirely in-house — our first original title is in production now.

educationalGames.title: [ES] Educational games
educationalGames.text: [ES] We turn complex knowledge into experiences students actually want to play — currently building edugames for universities across Bolivia and Belgium.

smallCards.title: [ES] Characters & story
smallCards.text: [ES] Two decades of comics, character design, and narrative across Mexico, the US, and Europe.

smallCards.title: [ES] Animation & art
smallCards.text: [ES] Hand-crafted motion and illustration that finally gives the unknown a face.

smallCards.title: [ES] Engineering
smallCards.text: [ES] Full-stack systems, AI, and the production tech that keeps the studio shipping.

studio.description: [ES] Five Yucatecans, one studio, two countries. We honor our roots while building for a global audience.

timeline.bodyPost: [ES] , one of the earliest graphic design and illustration studios in Mérida — where most of us first met and learned the craft.
[ES]  — a concept and a creature that would eventually pull the whole team under one banner.

timeline.bodyPre: [ES] Unknown Creature Games is formally founded in Mérida, Yucatán, with a business center in

timeline.bodyPost: [ES]  — the first time we share all of our creative talent with the world under our own name.

team.description: [ES] Designers, illustrators, animators, and an engineer — together for over two decades.

members.name: [ES] Benjamín Carbonero
members.title: [ES] Creative Director · Writer
members.bioPre: [ES] 26 years across comics, games, and film — including work with Kevin Grevioux, creator of

members.name: [ES] Alonso Pérez Cervera
members.title: [ES] Art Director · Graphic Designer
members.bio: [ES] Mexican illustrator and designer known as Jaxinto — 20+ years across illustration, branding, comics, and character design, from Mérida.

members.name: [ES] José Cobá Herrera
members.title: [ES] Character & Visual Development
members.bio: [ES] 15+ years designing characters and interfaces for educational and entertainment games.

members.name: [ES] Juan Fleites
members.title: [ES] Illustrator & Animator
members.bio: [ES] Horror, sci-fi, and humor across indie comics in Mexico, the US, and Europe.

members.name: [ES] Diego Salazar
members.title: [ES] Technical Director
members.bio: [ES] Full-stack architect with 10+ years building scalable systems, AI, and the tech behind the studio.

careers.title: [ES] Want to build the unknown with us?

game.description: [ES] Our first original game is in the works. An original story, an original world, and a creature all our own.

notify.description: [ES] Drop your email and we will tell you the moment our first game — and everything around it — goes live.
notify.successPre: [ES] Thanks — you're on the list. We'll reach out from
notify.error: [ES] Something went wrong — please try again.

footer.tagline: [ES] A Mexican-American game studio. We are all Yucatecans, honoring our roots while leaving a mark on the entertainment industry.
footer.copyright: [ES] © 2026 Unknown Creature Games. All rights reserved.
footer.signature: [ES] We give shape to the unknown

metadata.title: [ES] Unknown Creature Games — A Mexican-American Game Studio
metadata.description: [ES] Unknown Creature Games is a Mexican-American studio crafting original worlds, unforgettable creatures, and educational games. Built by five Yucatecans, from Mérida to Houston.
